subcodes.first_line: The Books have indeed borne witness unto the Book of God, the Lord of all worlds. Every thing hath testified to the Day of God, yet the people [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد شهدت الکتب لکتاب الله اله العالمین قد شهد کل شیء لیوم الله ولکن القوم
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @chastisement and requital, @rejection, opposition and persecution
